policy: Tenant UI must use semantic tokens. Only brand assets, non-visible masks, on-media contrast, structural shadows, and authored illustrations may retain literal visual values.

exceptions.reason: Company marks retain their official brand colors and are not tenant-theme artwork.
The white rectangle is part of the embedded customer logo artwork, not provider UI chrome.
Black masks and white vector layers define the pinned abstract illustration; its surrounding gradient is tenant-tokenized.
The black backing layer is required by the animated gradient-text effect; the visible gradient uses tenant accent tokens.
Black is used only in the radial mask.
The canvas particle effect requires concrete RGB colors and the rgba value is a non-visible mask.
The canvas implementation requires a parseable concrete fallback; the caller selects light/dark contrast.
The subtle elevation shadow is structural rather than a tenant palette color.
The CTA overlays arbitrary CMS media and requires invariant readable foreground and controls.
The pastel panel and its invariant contrast system are the authored visual identity of this variant; its grid rules are tenant-tokenized.
The shader library requires concrete light/dark RGB inputs and cannot consume CSS variables.
These values belong to the pinned multicolor vector illustration, not ordinary CTA controls.
Black is used only as a CSS radial mask.
Black is used only as a CSS radial mask.
Black exists only in the border-beam mask; the visible beam colors use tenant accent tokens.
The statistic cards use chart tokens; these remaining values belong only to the embedded character illustration.
The values define the pinned multicolor animated vector artwork.
The neon 404 artwork deliberately retains its authored palette; surrounding text and actions remain semantic.
The white pseudo-element is an invariant glitch highlight over the dark effect layer.

primitiveExceptions.reason: Canvas RGB parsing requires a concrete default color.
The rotated tooltip arrow needs a fixed micro-radius independent of site component shape.
Hex values occur only in Recharts selector matching and the fixed radius belongs to tiny legend markers.
